description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI Build that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have three jobs: build_msvc on windows-latest, build_macos on macos-latest, and build_linux on ubuntu-22.04 with a matrix strategy for different presets. Each job should check out the repository with submodules, configure and build using cmake, run tests with ctest, and for build_linux, upload code coverage to Codecov if the preset is clang-ci-coverage.
